form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== orgId[业务组织] ticketId[关联工单] agentId[处理人] source[来源] =========>time[计时信息]====== startTime[开始时间] endTime[结束时间] duration[时长(分钟)] isBillable[是否可计费] billingRate[计费费率] billableAmount[计费金额] =========>approval[审批信息]====== approvalStatus[审批状态] approvedById[审批人] approvedAt[审批时间] =========>reference[关联引用]====== projectId[关联项目] taskId[关联任务] description[工作内容描述] ========^audit[审计信息]========= createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]
